title: randia longiflora
intro: Randia longiflora, also known as the "Tongkat Ali" or "Long Flower Randia," is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, such as improved testosterone levels, enhanced physical performance, and reduced stress and anxiety. Randia longiflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsule, and tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
